model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time ~ C(birthyr) + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(sex) + daca_post + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + TASK287G + JAIL287G + SECURECOMMUNITIES + LFPR + UNEMP", data=sample, weights=sample['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': sample['statefip']})
